CVE-2021-22204.title: Improper neutralization of user data in the DjVu file format in E ...
CVE-2021-22204.description: Improper neutralization of user data in the DjVu file format in ExifTool versions 7.44 and up allows arbitrary code execution when parsing the malicious image

CVE-2022-23935.title: lib/Image/ExifTool.pm in ExifTool before 12.38 mishandles a $file ...
CVE-2022-23935.description: lib/Image/ExifTool.pm in ExifTool before 12.38 mishandles a $file =~ /\|$/ check, leading to command injection.
